query:
ALTER TABLE users 
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS stampCount INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS lifetimeStamps INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS lastStampDate TIMESTAMP NULL;
